name: Korean Casual Summer Outfit Formula — Neutral Utility Layers
why: The formula of beige utility jacket + white tank + wide-leg beige trousers is so clean and polished. It's the kind of outfit that looks expensive but is actually very simple to put together. The utility jacket adds structure without being formal. I could wear this to a coffee shop meeting or a casual brand event. Love that it works for Irish summer weather too — layers are always smart.
